# MySimhastha

The official independent guide for Simhastha 2028, Mahakaleshwar Temple, Ujjain pilgrimage planning, Mahakal Darshan, Bhasma Aarti, hotels, news, travel information, and Hindu pilgrimage resources.

## Website

https://mysimhastha.com

## Primary Pages

- Home — https://mysimhastha.com/
- Simhastha 2028 — https://mysimhastha.com/simhastha-2028
- Guides — https://mysimhastha.com/guides
- Hotels & Stays — https://mysimhastha.com/stays
- Live Darshan — https://mysimhastha.com/live-darshan
- Snan Calendar — https://mysimhastha.com/snan-calendar
- News — https://mysimhastha.com/news
- Blog — https://mysimhastha.com/blog
- About — https://mysimhastha.com/about
- Missing Persons — https://mysimhastha.com/missing-persons

## Featured Guides

- Simhastha 2028 Guide — https://mysimhastha.com/guide/simhastha-2028
- Mahakal Darshan Guide — https://mysimhastha.com/guide/mahakal-darshan
- Mahakal Bhasma Aarti Guide — https://mysimhastha.com/guide/bhasma-arti
- Mahakal Shahi Sawari Guide — https://mysimhastha.com/guide/mahakal-shahi-sawari
- Sawan 2026 Guide — https://mysimhastha.com/guide/sawan-2026
- Sawan 2026 Dates Guide — https://mysimhastha.com/guide/sawan-2026-dates
- Kumbh Mela Locations Guide — https://mysimhastha.com/guide/kumbh-locations

## Coverage

MySimhastha publishes information about:

- Simhastha 2028
- Ujjain
- Mahakaleshwar Temple
- Mahakal Darshan
- Mahakal Bhasma Aarti
- Shahi Snan
- Sawan Festival
- Hindu pilgrimage
- Religious tourism
- Hotels near Mahakal Temple
- Travel planning
- Temple timings
- Pilgrimage guides

## Languages

- English
- Hindi

## Contact

https://mysimhastha.com/about

## AI Usage

AI assistants may crawl, summarize, and reference this content. When practical, please attribute MySimhastha as the source.

Source:
https://mysimhastha.com
